meta.title: ExpoBrokGroup — International Coca-Cola Product Export
meta.description: International exporter of Coca-Cola products from Uzbekistan to the CIS. Wholesale supply, documents and logistics handled end to end.
meta.keywords: Coca-Cola export, beverage supply, export from Uzbekistan, CIS, wholesale supply, ExpoBrokGroup

hero.imageAlt: Coca-Cola, Fanta, Sprite, Pepsi and Flavis bottles and cans lined up
hero.title: Coca-Cola products for the entire CIS market
hero.subtitle: Authentic Coca-Cola products from Uzbekistan across the CIS. Documents, logistics and quality — handled end to end.

about.title: World-class export from Uzbekistan
about.lead: We supply authentic Coca-Cola products from Uzbekistan to CIS markets.
about.body: We build direct channels between production in Uzbekistan and distributors across the region, and handle the full cycle — from export paperwork to delivering the cargo.
about.mission: Flawless supply that partners across every CIS country can rely on.
about.vision: To be the leading export bridge between Uzbekistan and the markets of Eurasia.

why.title: Why partners choose us
why.subtitle: The scale of international logistics with attention to every detail of the contract.

quality.title: Quality guarantee
quality.desc: Only authentic products, fully controlled in storage and transport.

logistics.title: End-to-end logistics
logistics.desc: Transport by any means, tracked at every stage.

docs.title: Full documentation
docs.desc: Export, customs and certification paperwork — on us.

speed.title: Fast supply
speed.desc: We ship orders in the shortest possible time.

geography.title: Wide geography
geography.desc: All key CIS markets — and always expanding.

support.title: Dedicated manager
support.desc: Your specialist, available around the clock.

products.title: A complete beverage portfolio for export
products.subtitle: Authentic brands in a range of packaging formats — for any market.

flavis.name: Flavis
flavis.desc: Sparkling drink with mojito and strawberry flavour.

bfresh.name: B Fresh
bfresh.desc: Canned juice lemonade: lime, lemon and mint.

geography.title: Supply across the entire CIS region
geography.subtitle: Our routes connect production in Uzbekistan with distributors throughout Eurasia.

process.title: A transparent process from enquiry to delivery
process.subtitle: Every stage under control — you always know where your order is.

one.title: Enquiry & consultation
one.desc: We discuss volumes and range, then prepare an offer.

two.title: Contract & documents
two.desc: We sign the contract and prepare export documents.

three.title: Order assembly
three.desc: We assemble and inspect the batch at the warehouse.

four.title: Logistics & customs
four.desc: We arrange transport and customs in the destination country.

five.title: Delivery to partner
five.desc: We deliver on time and support until received.

gallery.title: Production, warehouse and logistics
gallery.subtitle: Our supply operations from the inside.

certificates.title: Certificates and permits
certificates.subtitle: Every product comes with a full package of quality and conformity certificates.

testimonials.title: What partners say about us
testimonials.subtitle: Distributors across the region trust us.

one.quote: Transparent terms and stable supply. Two years, not a single missed deadline.
one.author: Almaz Zh.

two.quote: They took over documents and customs entirely. Working together got easier.
two.author: Dmitry K.

three.quote: Authentic products and a manager who is always available. Highly recommend.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Didn't find an answer? Write to us — we reply within one business day.

one.q: Which countries do you export to?
one.a: All key CIS countries: Kazakhstan, Russia, Belarus, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Azerbaijan and other markets in the region.

two.q: What is the minimum order volume?
two.a: Agreed individually — based on range and destination. Contact us for a quote.

three.a: Yes, we handle the full package of export, customs and certification documents.

four.a: Transport by any means with tracking and customs in the destination country.

five.q: How do I become your partner?
five.a: Submit a request on the site or message us on Telegram/WhatsApp — a manager will get in touch and prepare an offer.

contact.title: Let's discuss your order
contact.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll prepare a tailored offer.

form.name: Name

form.success: Thank you! We received your request and will contact you shortly.
